# DECLuTTER AI — AI Visibility File
# https://github.com/Pastorsimon1798/DECLuTTER-AI

## Project Overview
- **Name**: DECLuTTER AI
- **URL**: https://github.com/Pastorsimon1798/DECLuTTER-AI
- **Description**: ADHD-friendly decluttering assistant using Flutter and on-device object detection
- **License**: MIT
- **Stack**: Flutter, Dart, Python, FastAPI, ONNX Runtime, SQLite
- **Status**: Active development (MVP stage)

## What It Does
DECLuTTER AI helps adults with ADHD declutter their physical spaces by:
1. Taking a photo of a cluttered area (desk, closet, shelf)
2. Automatically detecting and grouping items (cables, books, clothing, electronics)
3. Guiding the user through keep/donate/trash/relocate/maybe decisions
4. Time-boxing the process in a 10-minute ADHD-friendly sprint
5. Estimating resale value for sellable items
6. Exporting session results as CSV

## Key Features
- **On-device object detection** using ONNX Runtime (privacy-first, works offline)
- **ADHD-friendly UI**: large buttons, visible progress, undo, haptic feedback, minimal text
- **Smart grouping**: items grouped by category with duplicate detection
- **Resale valuation**: "Money on the Table" estimates per group
- **10-minute sprint timer**: focused decluttering sessions
- **CSV export**: track progress over time
- **Privacy-first**: all analysis on-device by default; optional cloud features require explicit opt-in

## Target Users
- Adults with ADHD who struggle with clutter and decision paralysis
- Neurodivergent individuals seeking low-friction organization tools
- Minimalists and decluttering enthusiasts
- Anyone who wants to monetize unused items through resale

## Use Cases
- Decluttering a messy desk, closet, dresser, or room
- Deciding what to keep, donate, recycle, or sell
- ADHD time-boxed organization and focus sessions
- Building resale listings from household items
- Reducing decision fatigue around physical clutter

## Architecture
```
Flutter Mobile App (Dart)
  ├── Capture → Camera + photo review
  ├── Detect → ONNX Runtime object detection
  ├── Group → Category-based item grouping
  ├── Decide → Decision cards (Keep/Donate/Trash/Relocate/Maybe)
  ├── Value → Resale estimation service
  └── Export → CSV + session history

FastAPI Backend (Python)
  ├── Analysis → AI item analysis adapter
  ├── Valuation → Price estimation (eBay comps + AI fallback)
  ├── Listings → Listing draft generation
  ├── Marketplace → eBay API integration
  └── Public Pages → Shareable listing pages
```

## Comparison
| Feature | DECLuTTER AI | Tody | Decluttr | General AI Apps |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Open source | ✅ MIT | ❌ | ❌ | Rare |
| ADHD-focused | ✅ Core mission | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| On-device detection | ✅ ONNX | N/A | N/A | Cloud-only |
| Resale valuation | ✅ Built-in | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Privacy-first | ✅ Default | ⚠️ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Free | ✅ | Paid | Takes cut | Freemium |
